author: Netflix Anime
text:
The stars in his eyes... #OSHINOKO
Akane's research digs up an actor who looks suspiciously like Aqua and Ruby...

【OSHI NO KO】 is now playing on in select regions on Netflix!
https://www.netflix.com/title/81684733

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

The stars in his eyes... #OSHINOKO
https://www.youtube.com/@netflixanime

Aqua joins the young and talented cast of a 2.5D stage adaptation of a popular manga, but tensions run high when the original creator gets too involved.
